title: SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: HOME FORWARD SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Housing Choice Voucher (Section 8) program helps low-income residents afford rental homes and apartments at normal market rates. Project-based Section 8 assistance is available at many locations throughout Multnomah County. These are apartments where the subsidy stays with the unit (it can not be taken by the resident to another location). Listings of apartment vacancies are updated approximately every 4-6 weeks on the website. Also accepts calls to report misuse of the program. 135 SW Ash Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: -Low-income households -Age 18 or older at the time of application or an emancipated minor under State Law -Individuals who have a terminal illness and have been diagnosed by a medical provider with a life expectancy of 12 months or less may apply for Section 8 under priority status Hours: -Section 8 Housing Voucher program services: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm, in person -Section 8 office phone: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm, appointments can be scheduled Email (503) 802-8333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 802-8333 Priority status only Hotline (503) 802-8571 Fraud Hotline Hotline (503) 415-8050 Applicant Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Section 8 Housing Voucher Program applications: Visit website -All other services: Visit website or call for more information -Paperwork can be dropped-off in a secure location at the building entrance FEES: Rental costs vary depending on the program DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses and MAX train lines stop 2-4 blocks from location Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING APARTMENT COMMUNITIES HOUSING/SHELTER - PROPERTY MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOME FORWARD
